headline: Centric Confirmed as Dassault Systèmes' PLM Standard for Consumer Goods & Retail (CPGR)
summary: Centric Software® is pleased to announce that its parent company, Dassault Systèmes, endorses Centric PLM as the preferred solution for Consumer Packaged Goods & Retail (CPGR). Centric Software delivers innovative, integrated, end-to-end AI-powered enterprise solutions to take products from concept to commercialization.

headline: nixit® Debuts in Walmart Nationwide With Its Vagina-Friendly Condoms™ in Its Largest Retail Rollout to Date
summary: WILMINGTON, Del., June 10, 2026--nixit®, a leader in sexual wellness and period care, is bringing its vagina-friendly condoms™ to nearly 2,000 U.S. Walmart stores, marking the largest retail rollout in the brand’s history. This brings nixit into one of the country’s most accessible retail environments, making cleaner, ingredient-conscious sexual wellness products easier to find nationwide.
